lines.hearsay: Bread was going into {place} long after the baking was done.
lines.gossip: {A} carried the day's leavings down to {B} at {place} and would not hear of a discount — {A} has never once let a loaf go stale in this village, and would like that known.
lines.report: {A} supplied bread to {B} at {place} on the evening account, slot {slot}.
